use_cases: Text input fields with animated floating labels for modern form designs
Login and signup forms requiring elegant label transitions
Search inputs with icon support and smooth focus animations
Contact and feedback forms with premium feel interactions
Any text input needing subtle spring-based motion feedback
ai_summary: A sleek animated text input component featuring a floating label that transitions with spring physics. Built with motion/react for smooth animations, supports icons, focus states, and works as both controlled and uncontrolled input. Clean minimalist design suitable for modern SaaS applications and form-heavy interfaces.
